notes:
Launcher starts fine, but no css is loaded (play button works which is the only one that matters).

Game starts to main menu and works fine there, but the game randomly crashes after a while and when doing the tutorial there is a point where the game always crashes. I didn't test if you can somehow skip the tutorial or something.

I also tested with 3.16-9 where the behaviour was the same as in 4.2-3 and also tested with 3.7-8 where I actually got past the point but there was no audio (except for cutscenes).
title: Sniper Elite V2 Remastered

notes: Games starts, runs and gets into play, but never recognizes the mouse for aim, shoot, etc. Mouse works for movement, but does not allow for a way to shoot or aim. If that was fixed, this would be platinum. :(
